steps: "Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567",
"Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty rate of 15% should apply, not the 13.5% rate that was applied",
"Submit corrected tax calculation: gross CAD 271,800 × 15% = CAD 40,770 tax, net should be CAD 231,030",
"If RBC cannot process refund, file claim directly with CRA for excess withholding tax recovery"

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
Skatteetaten – Reduced WHT on Dividends for Foreign Shareholders
